members.member:
Token name
Gets or sets name.

member.name: P:Prime.DffService.MtlTokenRule.ValueDecoderFields
member.summary: Gets or sets value decoder field.

members.member:
conclusion: PRIME Service will error out if die id is not part of these This is die id.- Only validate tokens that match the die id. If not defined, meaning PKG level.
Gets ref levels.

conclusion: PRIME Service will always try to validate. Check if this parameter only use to skip/not skip This is the upload socket - if not the same as current socket, will skip token validation. Do we still do this? or validate regardless.
Gets or sets first upload socket type.

conclusion: PRIME Service will always try to validate. Check if this parameter only use to skip/not skip This is process step [for HCSL] - if not defined but running HCSL -> skip validation on the token. Do we still do this?
Gets or sets upload process step.

member.name: P:Prime.DffService.MtlTokenRule.IsDataFormatCheckEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether is data format check enabled.

member.name: P:Prime.DffService.MtlTokenRule.IsDataRangeCheckEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether is data range check enabled.

members.member:
Still valid. Set should fail if try to overwrite.
Gets or sets a value indicating whether is allowed to override.

When true - this indicates that the DFF value is base64 encoded (i.e. value would need to be decoded before use)
Gets or sets a value indicating whether is compression.

Check if we have the right number of delimiters
Gets or sets delimiter count.

field indicating whether or not to fail the validation when Dff value is being set
Gets or sets a value indicating whether is kill mode validation.

To preserve the original value from the MTL file for kill mode.
Gets or sets a value indicating whether is kill mode validation based directly from MTL file regardless of OPTYPE.

Check for the string length does not exceed.
Gets or sets string length.

Hold the value of processed allowed/disallowed value
Gets processed range value.

Use this default value if not found
Gets or sets default value.

Do we still need tihs? Not writing to GDS anymore // Conclusion we will need this for name.
Gets or sets name.

member.summary: This function parses all lines in the UBE file, populating this data structure with its contents.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.DffUbe.MergeTwoOptypeDataIntoOne(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Merge two op type data into one.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.DffUbe.GetDffByVid(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get dff by vid. This API will attempt to find the token value by first: 1. If no DieId is provided, the API will return a token value that matches to the provided optype for the first ULT defined in the UBE file. 2. If a DieId is provided, search for a token matching to dieId/optype in the pkg/stack level. 3. If not found in unit level, attempt to find the ULT level that matches to the ULT value in the UBE file. The API expects the full ULT name for the DieId field, not the dieId it corresponds to. The API will then match to the token corresponding to the provided optype.
member.param: VID used to search for the token.
Name of the token to return.
Die id value used to search for the token. Please refer to the API description on how to use this field.
Operation type used to search for the token. Please refer to the API description on how to use this field.
If true, prints failure to return token data to ituff.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.DffUbe.TryGetVidPerUlt(System.String,System.String@,Prime.DffService.TpType,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.DffUbe.TryGetUltFromUbePerDieId(System.String,System.String,System.String@,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get ult line by dieId and VID from UBE file.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.DffUbe.TryGetDffTokenInUnitLevel(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Search for a DFF token in the unit level data.
member.param: Visual id to use when searching for token. The API will only match to tokens within this VID.
Name of the token to retrieve.
The dieId to match to when searching for the token. If a token with the same name is defined for multiple dieId, the API will only match to the token defining this value.
The operationType to match to when searching for the token. If a token with the same name and is defined multiple times for the same dieId, the API will only match to the token containing this value.
Populated with DFF token when API returns true. Will not be populated if the API returns false. Maybe null if ref var is not instantiated beforehand.
member.returns: A DFF token within the unit level data matching to provided parameters.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.DffUbe.TryGetDffTokenInUltLevel(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Search for a DFF token in the ULT level data, retrieving from the ULT that corresponds to the dieId.
member.param: Visual id to use when searching for token. The API will only match to tokens within this VID.
Name of the token to retrieve.
The dieId to match to when searching for the token. If a token with the same name is defined for multiple dieId, the API will only match to the token defining this value.
The operationType to match to when searching for the token. If a token with the same name and is defined multiple times for the same dieId, the API will only match to the token containing this value.
Populated with DFF token when API returns true. Will not be populated if the API returns false. Maybe null if ref var is not instantiated beforehand.
member.returns: True if the token was found with the specified params. Otherwise, false.
member.remarks: Lookup of tokens will prioritize matches within "NULL" ULT tokens. If none are found, the search continues to tokens defined in initialized ULT scopes.

members.member:
this should be a pointer to the map of m_pkgData in DffVid
Gets or sets package level data.

The dieID name tag to ULT name
Gets or sets die id.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.DffService.BuildUbeSharedStorageDatabaseFromInlineDffCall(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Read UBE file and construct the UBE database in the sharedstorage. This path for the UBE file is determined by the outcome of the GetDFF api. inLineUbeFile is an input NetApps file, resultant of the outcome of inLineDFF api. should be executed once per group of units at MainFlow.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether is DLE, custom string length check skipped.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether is ube file skipped.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.FailItuffDataInfoList.CleanEndOfFlowFailingData
member.summary: Clean end of flow failing data.

summary.para: Definition Group DffService, reads UBE File(stacks supported) and MTL File, Get and Set DFF during operations, Megatoken Print from CurrentDff.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.Init(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initialize MTL file rules to local memory. By getting file directory from UserVar DFFVars.MTL_FILE_PATH.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.SetDff(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Set Dff value to current optype and current die id. This will replace the whole token value or per field value. Example of SetDFF without field name: SetDFF(TokenName, tokenValue) Example of SetDFF with field name: SetDFF(TokenName.FieldName, FieldValue) TokenName and FieldName is delimited by "." and only single field is allowed.
member.param: Dff token to set and fieldName to set (if exist).
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.SetDff(System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Set Dff value to current optype based on the input die id. This will replace the whole token value or per field value. Example of SetDFF without field name: SetDFF(TokenName, tokenValue, targetDieId) Example of SetDFF with field name: SetDFF(TokenName.FieldName, FieldValue, targetDieId) TokenName and FieldName is delimited by "." and only single field is allowed.
member.param: Dff token to set and field name to set (if exist).
Target die id to set the dff to.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.GetDff(System.String,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the Dff value for the current optype and current die id.
member.param: Dff token name to retrieve the value.
To enable/disable the get fail ituff print.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Dff value for the given token name.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.GetDff(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the Dff value for input optype and die id.
member.param: Dff token name to retrieve the value.
optype to get the dff data from.
target die id to get the dff data from.
To enable/disable the get fail ituff print.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.GetDffByOpType(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the Dff value for the current die id based on the input optype.
member.param: Dff token name to retrieve the value.
optype to get the dff data from.
To enable/disable the get fail ituff print.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.GetDffByDieId(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the Dff value for the current optype based on the input die id.
member.param: Dff token name to retrieve the value.
target die id to get the dff data from.
To enable/disable the get fail ituff print.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.GetDffFromUltDatabase(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Calls GetDFF API to get UBE paths for the eFuseIds input.
member.param: Timeout for the API to get response from the UTL DB.
The session context of this operation.

members.member:
Initialize the Dff values to populate the dff structure based on the whichsocket config and fuseread This is supposed to be call per unit and not in main flow.
The optype to read the DFF data from. The optype to write the DFF data to. write mode - WRITE, LOCALWRITE or NOUPLOAD. Current socket process type. Controls which groups of tokens will be killed for when failing In-Place Validations and End of Flow Validations. Supported values: ALLKILL - Enables validation failures for all tokens NONKILL Disables validation failures for all tokens ModuleName Enables validation failures for -ModuleName- !ModuleName Disables validation failures for -ModuleName-. Examples: ALLKILL - All tokens validated and killed for ALLKILL,!MODULEA - All tokens except tokens tagged to MODULEA validated and killed for. NONKILL - No token killed for. NONKILL,MODULEA - Only MODULEA tokens are validated and killed for. The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.EnableIndividualTokenLogging(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Enables the individual tokens printout in datalog.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.DisableIndividualTokenLogging(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Disables the individual tokens printout in datalog.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.BuildUbeSharedStorageDatabase(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Read UBE file and construct the UBE database in the sharedstorage. This path for the UBE file is determined by SCVars.ULT_DOWNLOAD_PATH and should be executed only once per lot in lotstart testmethod.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.GetInlineDff(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Calls GetDFF API to get UBE paths for the eFuseIds input.
member.param: Timeout for the API to get response from the UTL DB.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Pipe separated string of ube file paths.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.ParseUbeFiles(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Parses a list of ube files and adds to ube shared storage database.
member.param: Pipe separated string of ube file paths.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.InquireForUltDownloaded(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Inquire if the ULT was properly downloaded from the GetDff API call earlier.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.PrintMegaToken(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Print the megatoken to dff and console.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.SetCurrentDieId(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Set the default current die id for dff service usage.
member.param: Die id name to set as the current die id.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.GetCurrentDieId(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the default current die id from dff service shared storage.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.GetUltPerDieId(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the ULT combined string for given die id.
member.param: The die id to store the ULT data for.
The session context of this operation.
member.exception: If there's no Ult for the given dieId.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.TryGetVidPerUlt(System.String,System.String@,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the VID string for given ult.
member.param: The VID that match the ULT line.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: The result of finding VID and ULT match.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.TryGetUltFromUbePerDieId(System.String,System.String,System.String@,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the ult line string for given dieID from UE file.
member.param: The vid that need to identify in UBE.
The target dieId under the vid.
The ult from target dieId under the vid.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: The result of finding VID and ULT match.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.TryGetUltPerDieId(System.String,System.String@,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Tries to gt the ULT combined string for given die id.
member.param: The die id to store the ULT data for.
The ult for the given dieId.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Boolean of the existance of the ULT.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.SetUltDataPerDieId(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Set the ULT data of given die id for dff service usage.
member.param: The die id to store the ULT data for.
The lot identifier of the die.
The wafer identifier of the die.
Enables or disables inline dff mode. Defaults to false.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.PrintUltDataPerDieIdToItuff(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Print the ULT data and given die id to ituff and console.
member.param: The die id to store the ULT data for.
The lot identifier of the die.
The wafer identifier of the die.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.ValidateEndOfFlowTokens(System.Boolean@,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Execute MTL token check for tokens that are not set using setDff.
member.param: The flag to tell if the function is failing DNS.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: TRUE for no failures in inline setdff and validation. FALSE for failure.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.OptypesDffTokensDataMerge(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Merging Optypes of Dff tokens data to another base optype.
member.param: The base of optype DFF Tokens data.
The optype DFF Tokens data that get merge.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.GetDffByVid(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary:
Get dff by vid. This API will attempt to find a token value in the DFF data by using the following conditional logic...
If no dieId is provided, the API will return a token value that matches to the provided optype for the first ULT defined in the UBE file.
Else-if... a dieId is provided, search for a token matching to dieId/optype in the pkg/stack level.
Else... not found in unit level, attempt to find the ULT level that matches to the ULT value in the UBE file. The API expects the full ULT name for the DieId field, not the dieId it corresponds to. The API will then match to the token corresponding to the provided optype.
member.param: The vid to get the token from.
The dff token name to get the value.
The die id to get the token from. Leave it empty for non-mcp.
Optype to get the token from.
To enable/disable the get fail ituff print.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: The token value that matches the VID, tokenname, die id and optype provided.
member.exception: Thrown if the provided VID could not be found or no token could be resolved with the provided parameters.

members.member:
Get DFF Token value straight from Ube File. User needs to provide token name, die id, and optype.
The dff token name to get the value. The die id to get the token from. Optype to get the token from. /// To enable/disable the get fail ituff print. The session context of this operation. The token value that matches the tokenname, die id and optype from UBE file.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.GetAllWriteableTokensForCurrentOptype(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get All DFF Token Names that's write-able for current optype with the provided die id. User need to provide die id.
member.param: The die id to get the token names from.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: List of token names for current optype that matches die id provided. For tokens with multiple fields will return as tokA.Field1.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.IsTokenUpdated(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Check if the token for current optype and given die id is already being updated in main flow.
member.param: The token name to check if it is already updated.
The die id to get the token names from.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: True for token was updated and false for token is default from ube or mtl.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.TryGetMtlRevision(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the Mtl revision if it's already loaded, empty otherwise.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.GetAllMtlTokensByDieId(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get all MTL tokens by die id.
member.param: The die id to get the tokens from.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: MTL tokens dictionary where the key is the token name and the value the token data.

remarks.example:
This is a code example:
var tokens = Prime.Base.ServiceStore<IDffService>.Service.GetAllMtlTokensByDieId("PKG", sessionContext);

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.GetAllMtlTokensByDieIdAndModule(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get all MTL tokens by die id with the ability to filter them by module name.
member.param: The die id to get the tokens from.
Module name for filtering the tokens.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: MTL tokens dictionary where the key is the token name and the value the token data.

remarks.example:
This is a code example:
var tokens = Prime.Base.ServiceStore<IDffService>.Service.GetAllMtlTokensByDieIdAndModule("PKG", "TPI", sessionContext);

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.PrintTokensToItuffFooter(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Print custom tokens to ITUFF footer.
member.param: The die id where the tokens are from.
User bin to be reported in the footer.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.IsDffMainFlowFailsExists(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.returns: boolean indicates wether dmff is empty.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.IsDffMainFlowNonKillFailsExists(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.returns: boolean indicates wether dmffn is empty.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.TryGetTokenFromUnitData(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.String@)
member.summary: Try-gets a token from the UBE file from unit scope data.
member.param: The visual id of the unit to retrieve the token from.
The die id that is associated with the desired token.
The operation type (optype) associated with the desired token.
The session context this API is called in.
If this function returns true, this value is populated with the token value taken from the UBE file. Will return all values associated with this token as a string.
member.returns: True if the token was found with the specified params. Otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Prime.DffService.IDffService.TryGetTokenFromUltData(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.String@)
member.summary: Try-gets a token from the UBE file from ULT scope data. Token is retrieved from the ULT linked to the specified dieId.
member.param: Name of the token to retrieve.
The visual id of the unit to retrieve the token from.
The ULT scope to retrieve the token from.
The operation type (optype) associated with the desired token.
The session context this API is called in.
If this function returns true, this value is populated with the token value taken from the UBE file. Will return all values associated with this token as a string.
member.returns: True if the token was found with the specified params. Otherwise, false.
